Title: Apple Business Manager (ABM) Setup & Intune Integration
Description: Configure Apple Business Manager tenant for AFFG and integrate with Microsoft Intune as the MDM provider. Add the Apple Push Notification certificate, configure ABM-Intune sync, and add the 4 Mac Mini and 6 MacBook serial numbers to the AFFG ABM fleet for automatic enrollment.

Title: Intune macOS Compliance & Configuration Profiles (FDA + Screen Recording)
Description: Define Intune device compliance policies for macOS (FileVault encryption, OS minimum version, password complexity, screen lock 15 min) and configuration profiles (FileVault silent enablement, MyAudit Privacy Preferences Policy Control profile granting Full Disk Access and Screen Recording, login window restrictions, OS update policy, system extensions allowlist for CrowdStrike + CloudBrink).

Title: ABM Enrollment & Imaging – 4 Mac Mini
Description: Execute ABM-driven Setup Assistant on each of the 4 Mac Mini devices: factory reset, automatic Intune enrollment, FileVault silent encryption, deploy security stack and MyAudit per Phase 1 baseline. Validate compliance state in Intune for each device.

Title: ABM Enrollment & Imaging – 6 MacBook
Description: Execute ABM-driven Setup Assistant on each of the 6 MacBook devices: factory reset, automatic Intune enrollment, FileVault silent encryption, deploy security stack and MyAudit per Phase 1 baseline. Validate compliance state in Intune for each device. Subject to AFFG hardware procurement and Apple delivery timeline.

Title: Endpoint Security Stack Deployment (CrowdStrike
Description: PMMAC
Frequency: Deploy the Technijian macOS endpoint security stack to all 10 Apple endpoints via Intune: CrowdStrike Falcon EDR, Huntress Managed Detection, ManageEngine Patch Management for macOS (PMMAC), and ConnectWise ScreenConnect (My Remote). Verify agent check-in for each product on every device. Test CrowdStrike with EICAR; confirm Huntress 24/7 monitoring is active.

Title: CloudBrink ZTNA Agent Deployment – 10 Endpoints
Description: Deploy the CloudBrink ZTNA agent to all 10 Apple endpoints via Intune. Verify agent auto-start, silent authentication via Entra SSO, and posture check (Intune compliance + FileVault active) per session.

Title: MyAudit UAM+DLP Deployment & Policy Configuration – 10 macOS Endpoints
Description: Install and configure the MyAudit UAM+DLP agent (Teramind macOS) on all 10 endpoints. Configure DLP policies: block USB/external storage, block clipboard copy to unmanaged apps, block local download of regulated data, block print-to-local, and block screen capture on protected windows. Verify 1-year UAM retention and audit-trail capture. Validate detection accuracy with test scenarios (USB block, clipboard, screenshot).

Title: Conditional Access Policy Suite – Named Location + Compliant Device + MFA
Description: Configure the Entra ID Conditional Access policy suite: Policy 1 — Office WAN IP named location plus Intune-compliant device requirement for M365 (Exchange, SharePoint, OneDrive, Teams). Policy 2 — Block legacy authentication (IMAP, POP3, SMTP AUTH, Exchange ActiveSync). Policy 3 — Require MFA for all sign-ins. Apply to all 31 M365 users.

Title: CloudBrink ZTNA Tenant & Connector Provisioning
Description: Provision the CloudBrink ZTNA tenant for AFFG and deploy the CloudBrink connector at the AFFG office. Configure identity provider integration with Entra ID for SSO. Define application resources: M365, Schwab Advisor Services, Interactive Brokers TWS / IBKR Web, internal file shares.

Title: CloudBrink Access Policies & Per-App Micro-Segmentation
Description: Configure CloudBrink per-application access policies and per-session device posture verification. Enable session logging (user, device, app, duration, source IP). Block lateral movement between applications.

Title: Schwab & IBKR IP Whitelist Update – Office WAN IP + CloudBrink Egress IP
Description: Coordinate with Schwab Advisor Services and Interactive Brokers to add the AFFG office WAN IP and the CloudBrink egress IP to each custodian's portal allowlist as the only permitted access origins. Validate access from both office and CloudBrink-tunneled endpoints. Confirm legacy entries are removed once new allowlist is active.

Title: Cisco Umbrella Removal from Legacy Desktops
Description: Remove the Cisco Umbrella DNS filtering agent from all 16 legacy desktops as part of the desktop offboarding workstream. CloudBrink ZTNA on the new managed Apple endpoints replaces Umbrella for DNS filtering and zero-trust egress.

Title: Intune MAM Policy Configuration – BYOD Outlook App (iOS & Android)
Description: Create and deploy Intune App Protection (MAM) policies for the Outlook App on iOS and Android personal devices. No MDM enrollment of personal devices. Block: copy/paste to personal apps, save-as to personal storage, screenshots of corporate content. Require: PIN/biometric for corporate apps. Enable selective corporate-data wipe on separation.

Title: MAM Policy Testing & Employee BYOD Setup Guide
Description: Test MAM containerization on a pilot personal device (iOS and Android). Produce an employee-facing BYOD setup guide explaining how to install the Outlook App, register with corporate identity, and what behavior to expect (PIN, copy/paste restrictions, selective wipe scope). Distribute to AFFG users.

Title: Agent Removal from 16 Legacy Desktops & Managed Services Offboarding
Description: Remove all Technijian agents (CrowdStrike, Huntress, ManageEngine Patch Mgmt, ScreenConnect, MyAudit if present) from each of the 16 legacy desktops. Decommission devices from the Technijian Intune tenant and managed services console. Document removal and confirm zero billable presence on Schedule A from the offboarding date.

Title: User Data Transfer Assistance – Legacy Desktop to Apple Endpoint
Description: Assist users transitioning from a retiring desktop to a new managed Apple endpoint with profile migration: Outlook signature, browser bookmarks, OneDrive sync, Teams sign-in, line-of-business app reauth. Coordinate cutover scheduling with each affected user.

Title: Schedule A Amendment – Fleet Right-Sizing & Compliance Stack Update
Description: Draft and deliver a Schedule A amendment reflecting (a) consolidation from 16 desktops to 10 Apple endpoints (-$424.00/mo on legacy stack), (b) addition of the new Apple endpoint stack with CloudBrink ZTNA Technijian-billed (+$355.00/mo), and (c) addition of MyAudit UAM+DLP on all 10 endpoints (+$1,081.00/mo). Net monthly change: +$1,012.00/mo (from $2,794.50/mo to $3,806.50/mo).

Title: End-to-End Security & Compliance Validation – All 10 Endpoints
Description: End-to-end validation of the deployed control stack: attempt M365 access from non-Intune device (should block), attempt USB exfiltration (MyAudit should block), attempt legacy auth (should block), attempt CloudBrink bypass (should fail), attempt access with non-compliant device (should block). Document results for the compliance binder.

Title: MyAudit DLP & CloudBrink Policy Verification (macOS)
Description: Verify each MyAudit DLP control on macOS: USB block, clipboard control, screen-capture block, print monitoring/block, file transfer DLP (browser uploads, Schwab/IBKR portals, Slack/Teams), application allow/block by bundle ID, file audit trail. Verify CloudBrink per-session posture check, per-app micro-segmentation enforcement, and session log capture.

Title: User Training – Managed Endpoints & CloudBrink Remote Access
Description: Conduct training for all AFFG users on the managed-device workflow: Apple endpoint sign-in with Entra ID + MFA, CloudBrink ZTNA auto-connect, custodian access via CloudBrink, MyAudit DLP restrictions (no USB/download/print), BYOD Outlook App containerization, lost/stolen device procedure. Distribute a quick-reference guide.

Title: Compliance Gap Assessment & Control Coverage Report (SEC/FINRA)
Description: Conduct a post-deployment gap assessment confirming every citation in the Section 3 Control-to-Citation Map (Reg S-P 2024, FINRA 3110, FINRA 4370, SEC 17a-4, NIST 800-53 Rev 5) is met by the deployed managed-device architecture. Document any residual gaps and remediation ownership. Store evidence in the AFFG compliance binder.

Title: Update Compliance Documentation Suite – Managed Device Architecture
Description: Produce the AFFG compliance documentation suite aligned with the managed Apple endpoint architecture: endpoint security policy, ZTNA access control runbook, Incident Response Plan referencing managed endpoints + CloudBrink, data handling policy, Service Provider Oversight including CloudBrink as an assessed vendor, and supervisory audit-trail architecture (endpoint + CloudBrink + Intune model). All documents in Technijian standard format.

Title: Final Deliverable Package & Client Acceptance Sign-Off
Description: Assemble the final deliverable package: as-built configuration export from Intune, CloudBrink, MyAudit; Section 3 Control-to-Citation evidence matrix; Phase 5 validation results; Phase 6 documentation suite; Schedule A amendment. Walk Iris Liu through the deliverable for client acceptance sign-off.
